monitor_the_situation.title: Strikes Hit Ali Al Salem Air Base in Kuwait, Buildings Destroyed
— S3 · Conflict · Ali Al Salem Air Base, Kuwait · 11m ago. New strikes hit Ali Al Salem Air Base in Kuwait, destroying multiple buildings amid ongoing US-Iran conflict.
Hamas Praises Stabbing Attack in West Bank
— S3 · Political · West Bank, Palestine · 17m ago. Hamas issued a statement praising the stabbing attack near Alon Moreh in the occupied West Bank, calling it a heroic act of resistance.
Oil Soars Close to US$100 on Fresh Middle East Attacks
— S3 · Economic · Middle East · 1h ago. Oil prices surged towards $100 per barrel following new attacks in the Middle East, indicating heightened geopolitical risk to oil supply from the region.
